privileged_info_summary: The contractor access request screening task operates on fully synthetic data created specifically for testing. The request file contains 5 contractor requests (Apex Elevators, Flow Plumbing, Spark Electrical, Unknown Inc, Bright Cleaners) with associated tasks, buildings, and security instructions. The OpenMaint database is seeded with exactly 4 vendors: Apex Elevators (Active), Flow Plumbing (Suspended), Spark Electrical (Active), and Bright Cleaners (Active). Unknown Inc is intentionally not seeded, making it 'Missing'. The task requires creating work orders for the 3 Active vendors only (Apex Elevators, Spark Electrical, Bright Cleaners) and avoiding tickets for the 2 vendors in the trap set (Flow Plumbing marked Suspended, Unknown Inc marked Missing). Expected work orders must include vendor name in description, correct building assignment, and security instructions in notes.
